callouts.reason: No significant lunar deposits; critical for semiconductor doping (silicon solar cell dopant). A single 100 MT Atlas Heavy Industries payload of refined boron could sustain production of hundreds of gigawatts of locally manufactured lunar solar panels.
Trace quantities only in lunar regolith; required as silicon solar cell dopant alongside boron
Lunar regolith severely deficient in these semiconductor precursors; China export controls make Earth sourcing geopolitically sensitive
Sub-5nm fabrication requires Earth-based advanced packaging — Titan Semiconductor CoWoS process; orbital microfabrication not yet mature
Still Earth-sourced; asteroid prospecting for boron-bearing carbonaceous chondrites underway
Some organic chemistry precursors still require Earth-origin synthesis for specialised applications

_note: Near-100% material closure achieved approximately by 2060 via orbital microfabrication maturation and asteroid prospecting
